method: Each missing URL opened manually in a normal residential browser (no Tor). Checked the final landing URL after redirects and whether a Product JSON-LD was present. 36/36 had NO product — every one is a discontinued/delisted item that 301-redirects to a category, the brand page, 'all items', or the region homepage. Zero were live products the parser missed.
